scripts.env:setup: npm run env:vapid && npm run env:token && npm run env:config && npm run env:admin
scripts.docker:dev: npm run env:setup && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --watch --build
scripts.docker:start: npm run env:setup && docker compose up --build -d
scripts.k8s:build: concurrently "npm run k8s:build:client" "npm run k8s:build:auth" "npm run k8s:build:agent" "npm run k8s:build:notification" "npm run k8s:build:sensor" "npm run k8s:build:simulator" "npm run k8s:build:socket" "npm run k8s:build:twin"
scripts.k8s:deploy: npm run k8s:deploy:namespace && npm run k8s:deploy:configmaps && npm run k8s:deploy:secrets && npm run k8s:deploy:states && npm run k8s:deploy:deployments && npm run k8s:deploy:ingress
scripts.k8s:up: npm run k8s:ingress && npm run k8s:build && npm run k8s:deploy
scripts.k8s:update: npm run k8s:build && kubectl rollout restart deployment -n crowdvision
scripts.db:clear:auth: docker compose exec auth-db mongosh authdb --eval "db.dropDatabase()"
scripts.db:clear:twin: docker compose exec twin-db mongosh twindb --eval "db.dropDatabase()"
scripts.db:clear:notification: docker compose exec notification-db mongosh notificationdb --eval "db.dropDatabase()"
scripts.db:clear: npm run db:clear:auth && npm run db:clear:twin && npm run db:clear:notification
scripts.docs: npm run docs:build:user && npm run docs:build:dev && npm run docs:landing
scripts.test: concurrently "npm run test:auth" "npm run test:twin" "npm run test:notification" "npm run test:sensor" "npm run test:client" "npm run test:socket"
